reviews.comment:
Todo excelente, siempre cargo a mí regreso de las vacaciones, muy atentos los playeros , muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent, I always pick it up when I return from vacation, the beach attendants were very attentive, highly recommended

reviews.comment:
Malisima .hace 10 minutos fui quise cargar la estación vacía y el playero un flaco alto un maleducado importante .la verdad gente así espanta .no dan ganas de volver a ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. I went there 10 minutes ago to fill up at the empty station, and the attendant, a tall, skinny guy, was incredibly rude. Honestly, people like that are awful. I have no desire to go back to that place.

reviews.comment:
Una de las pocas YPF que se encuentran en Villa Gesell, y del ACA. Precio elevado por ser la costa atlántica a diferencia de Capital Federal.
Si se junta cola de autos por no haber muchas por la zona.
Pero todo bien, atención amable.

(Translated by Google)
One of the few YPF gas stations in Villa Gesell, and an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) station. Prices are high because it's on the Atlantic coast, unlike in Buenos Aires. There can be a line of cars since there aren't many in the area. But everything is fine, and the service is friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5Z04tb2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mmmm falta mantenimiento baños re sucios...en la playa buena atención de los plateros.

(Translated by Google)
Mmm, the bathrooms are dirty and need maintenance... but the silversmiths on the beach are very helpful.
